Video.summary: Bob paints snow-covered mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Peaks

Video.summary: Bob paints a hushed valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Mountain River

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain in an Oval

Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Bob paints a peaceful autumn path.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Exhibition

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry scene on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Seclusion

Video.summary: Bob's landscape fades into infinity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Half Oval Vignette

Video.summary: Branches bend over a misty stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Morning Mist

Video.summary: Gold, lavender and crimson surround a quiet brook.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Crimson Oval

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: Icy mountains withstand winter's rigors.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a twilight scene in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Toward Day's End

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry vignette.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frozen Beauty in Vignette

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening Waterfall

Video.summary: Bob creates a tranquil landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Soft Mountain Glow

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: Brilliant foliage surrounds a quiet pond.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Absolutely Autumn

Video.summary: A scenic world of green trees and bushes reflecting into calm waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints an idyllic scene within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Bliss

Video.summary: Bob paints large and small falls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Falls in the Glen

Video.summary: Bob paints a deep-woods scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tranquil Wooded Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints purple skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Aglow

Video.summary: Bob paints a mirror image.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snow Birch

Video.summary: Bob paints within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Storm's A Comin'

Video.summary: Bob paints a fishing spot.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Angler's Haven

Video.summary: Sunshine on a waterside landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Twilight Beauty

Video.summary: Bob paints a river scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Purple Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Early Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a crimson shoreline.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Crimson Tide

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rustic Winter Woods

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry night.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening at the Falls

Video.summary: Bob paints autumn colors.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bright Autumn Trees

Video.summary: Waves crash against a moonlit shore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Seascape

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Steep Mountains

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates a new painting medium.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain at Sunset

Video.summary: A gentle breeze sways palm trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tropical Seascape

Video.summary: Truly picture perfect; a bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Reflections

Video.summary: Warm summer mountain water and luxurious green grass.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Brown Mountain

Video.summary: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape, painted half black and half white.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black & White Seascape

Video.summary: A bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lazy River

Video.summary: A slow river winds around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black River
